name: harness
description: Reusable Codex harness for workflow-oriented project task control and adapter-driven execution. / 可复用 Codex 项目任务控制与 adapter 执行工作流。

interface.shortDescription: Orient, intake, initialize, and execute adapter-driven project work. / 定位、收集、初始化并执行 adapter 驱动的项目工作。
interface.longDescription: Agent Harness bridges Codex-native Goal, Plan, Thread, and subagent execution with durable fixed/adapter project control: authoritative Task/Goal state, repository Runs/DAGs, postflight state sync, gates, and evidence. zh-CN fallback: Agent Harness 把 Codex 原生 Goal、Plan、Thread 和 subagent 执行连接到持久化 fixed / adapter 项目控制，包括权威 Task/Goal 状态、repository Run/DAG、postflight 状态同步、gate 和 evidence。
defaultPrompt: Use harness:orient to inspect durable state and choose codex-direct, codex-direct-postflight, or durable-harness. Prefer Codex runtime Goal and Plan for current execution.
